_comment: Merge this into the PostToolUse array in your .claude/settings.json

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs)$'; then if [ -f ".prettierrc" ] || [ -f ".prettierrc.json" ] || [ -f ".prettierrc.yml" ] || [ -f "prettier.config.js" ] || [ -f "prettier.config.ts" ]; then npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then if command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi
